channel.title: DOT Physical — Weekly Compliance Newsletter
channel.description: FMCSA updates, DOT physical tips, drug testing guides, and employer compliance resources. Delivered every Monday.

item.title: 2025 FMCSA Random Drug Testing Rate Stays at 50%
item.description: The FMCSA has confirmed the random drug testing rate for CDL drivers remains at 50% of covered employees for 2025. Here's what that means for your fleet's testing program and how to ensure you hit the required numbers before your next audit.
item.content:encoded:
The FMCSA has confirmed the random drug testing rate for CDL drivers remains at 50% of covered employees for 2025. Here's what that means for your fleet's testing program and how to ensure you hit the required numbers before your next audit.

Read the full article →

item.title: What to Expect at Your First DOT Physical Exam
item.description: A step-by-step walkthrough of the FMCSA DOT physical — what the examiner checks, how long it takes, and how to prepare so you pass the first time.
item.content:encoded:
A step-by-step walkthrough of the FMCSA DOT physical — what the examiner checks, how long it takes, and how to prepare so you pass the first time.

Read the full article →

item.title: Can Prescription Medications Cause a Positive DOT Drug Test?
item.description: How MRO review protects drivers who use legitimate prescription medications — and which drugs to always disclose before your test.
item.content:encoded:
How MRO review protects drivers who use legitimate prescription medications — and which drugs to always disclose before your test.

Read the full article →

item.title: 5 Things That Fail a DOT Compliance Audit — and How to Fix Them
item.description: FMCSA auditors look for specific gaps. Here are the five most common compliance failures and exactly how to close them before your next review.
item.content:encoded:
FMCSA auditors look for specific gaps. Here are the five most common compliance failures and exactly how to close them before your next review.

Read the full article →

item.title: The Return to Duty Process Explained: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: After a positive drug test, what happens next? We break down every step of the DOT Return to Duty process for drivers and employers.
item.content:encoded:
After a positive drug test, what happens next? We break down every step of the DOT Return to Duty process for drivers and employers.

Read the full article →
